description: Baseline window capability. The app routes all data access through its own #[tauri::command]s (which don't require a permission), so the only built-in surface it needs is the event system: the Rust shell emits `vault-changed` and the WebView listens for it (live refresh). Without `core:event:default` the listener has no permission and the event is never delivered, so the UI never refreshes on out-of-band edits.
